description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
- The biggest addition in this release is addition of Diffusion ControlNets!
Also:
- new non-interrupting app notifications system
- View chat templates for a foundation model
- several UI bufixes for Workflows
What's Changed
- Added runs reload when switching experiments by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/555
- fix segment analytics using context properly by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/563
- Run prettier on entire codebase to avoid linter diffs by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/566
- ControlNets plus ability to view processed reference image by @Sourenm in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/543
- Allow Generate Tab to be active without a foundation model by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/567
- Cancel Workflow Run by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/560
- Don't allow workflows of the same name by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/569
- Add chat template tokenizer by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/561
- Make the ui better by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/570
- Update first supported engine within experiment config db as well by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/572
- Add an app-wide notifications system and remove alerts from workflows by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/564
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.19.1...v0.19.2
